title: No dependency manifest (requirements.txt / pyproject.toml)
evidence: run_dir has no requirements.txt or pyproject.toml, yet server.py:7 imports `mcp.server.fastmcp` and query_tools.py:7 imports `pandas`. Runtime deps are undeclared.
suggestion: Add a requirements.txt (or pyproject.toml) pinning `mcp` and `pandas` so the server is reproducibly installable.

title: Player search passes user input to str.contains without regex=False
evidence: query_tools.py:342,344,346,348 — `df["Name"].str.contains(name, case=False, na=False)` treats the argument as a regex; a name/club containing regex metacharacters (e.g. '(' ) raises or behaves unexpectedly.
suggestion: Pass `regex=False` to str.contains for literal substring matching.

title: search_matches head-to-head summary computed over truncated rows
evidence: query_tools.py:142 iterates `rows` (already cut to head(limit), default 50) when tallying the inline head_to_head counts, so the summary undercounts when total_found > limit. The dedicated head_to_head() tool (query_tools.py:200) is correct.
suggestion: Compute the inline h2h tally over the full filtered df before applying the limit, or drop the inline summary in favour of the head_to_head tool.

title: Brasileirao competition queries ignore the historical (2003-2019) CSV
evidence: query_tools.py:52-53 `_comp_df` maps Brasileirao to `data.brasileirao` (Brasileirao_Matches.csv) only; the `historico` frame (novo_campeonato_brasileiro.csv) is in all_matches but unreachable when a competition filter is set, so standings for seasons present only in historico return 'No data'.
suggestion: Union the historico frame into the Brasileirao branch of _comp_df, or document the covered season range.

title: BR-Football-Dataset.csv loadable but not reachable through any tool
evidence: data_loader.py:139-150 loads br_football, but all_matches (data_loader.py:222-235) unions only brasileirao/cup/libertadores/historico, and no tool reads data.br_football — so this dataset is queryable only via direct property access, not via the MCP tools.
suggestion: Include br_football in the all_matches union (with dedup) or expose it via a tool to meet the 'all 6 CSVs queryable' success criterion.
